displayList.title: displayList
displayList.description: Clean numbered list of test drives to display directly to user. Shows booking name, vehicle, dealer, date and status on separate lines. Display this exactly as returned. Do not modify.

idMap.title: idMap
idMap.description:
Split on || then ## to get:
Part 1 = number
Part 2 = testDriveId
Part 3 = dealerId
Part 4 = vehicleId
Store silently. Do not show to user.

message.title: message
message.description: Display this to user when totalCount = 0. Contains friendly error explaining why no test drives were found.

totalCount.title: totalCount
totalCount.description: Total number of test drives returned. If 0 display the message to user.
